Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Divine Titan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — The Divine Titan is a being that Raion can summon from within Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 17''' — The Divine Titan is a red pilotable vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — Raion once flew a Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — Divine Titans can be combined to defeat a Behemoth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — The Divine Titan responds to extreme need and can magnify a user's Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — Divine Titans are impressive Aethertech machines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Divine Titans can possess a level of awareness or personality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — A Divine Titan can go fist-to-fist with a Behemoth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — The Divine Titan's voice is made by vibrating plates of armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — The Divine Titan pushes its energy into the pilot to try and fuse with them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — The Divine Titan is a powerful machine that can be piloted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — The Divine Titan's pilot was being attacked by the machine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — The Divine Titan has absorbed new material to grow beyond Raion's control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — A Divine Titan is an entity that can be held in the vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 43''' — The Divine Titan is capable of tearing through the Grand Hive's armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The Divine Titan is a construct used by Raion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Raion's Divine Titan was experiencing a breakdown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Raion possesses a Divine Titan badge.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 37''' — Raion Raithe's power is significant when using his Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — Raion's piloting speed is compared to his corrupted Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — Raion Raithe has an astral dragon's blood that soaked into his Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Raion cannot control his Divine Titan without the Captain's help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Raion Raithe can summon a Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — The Divine Titan is a hundred-and-fifty-foot mech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — The Divine Titan is activated via a circular badge key.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — A Divine Titan is a bright green humanoid mech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — The Divine Titan has plates on its chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — The Divine Titan is a construct used by the Titan Knights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — A Divine Titan is superior to any substitute when fighting the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — Divine Titans are Aethertech constructs that have restrictions and are described as being 'proud'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — A Divine Titan must be summoned to use certain restricted Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — The narrator possesses a Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Raion needs a Divine Titan to perform his Combat Art on a large scale.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — Raion is associated with the Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — The Divine Titan is the crew's most effective weapon left.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Divine Titans require pilots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The narrator has not been in control of a Divine Titan for a long time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — Divine Titans are designed to magnify the abilities of their pilot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — Divine Titans are not Zenith Devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — No individual Divine Titan has ever been able to fight on the level of Raion and the narrator.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Raion's Divine Titan is covered in golden veins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Raion's Divine Titan was in one piece, more or less.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Divine Titans are powerful entities that can fly out of Shadow Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Divine Titan has a cockpit where Omega pooled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Divine Titan is a mech controlled by Raion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Raion's Divine Titan was dissolving into red light while falling toward Zykaros.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
